headline: JW Marriott Marco Island owners to change May 1. What we know
summary: Born from the real estate acumen of the Mackle Brothers, today's $835 million JW Marrott on Marco Island started as an $800,000 50-room hotel.

headline: MGM Collection with Marriott Bonvoy Unveils 'Best of Both Worlds' Moments Series
summary: MGM Collection with Marriott Bonvoy® today announced a new marquee Marriott Bonvoy MomentsTM series, "Best of Both Worlds," that pairs iconic MGM Collection properties in Las Vegas with extraordinary Marriott Bonvoy hotels around the globe. These unique packages give travelers exclusive, once-in-a-lifetime dual-destination experiences combining entertainment and culinary excellence with best-in-class accommodations, while highlighting the best of the groundbreaking partnership between Marriott I

headline: Shares of travel-related companies are trading higher amid a drop in oil prices after President Trump posted on social media that the U.S. postponed strikes on Iranian power generation and energy assets for five days, which may ease inflation concerns. ICE agents deployed to airports to ease TSA shortages amid a partial government shutdown may alleviate travel complications.
